response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience and strong technical skills in multiple languages, but his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and desktop applications rather than embedded systems, Linux kernel development, or networking security. While he demonstrates proficiency in C/C++ and Linux, there is no clear evidence of experience with embedded firmware, switch chip knowledge, or specific security technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X. Native-level Japanese proficiency is also not indicated.
strengths: Strong software development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded)
Proficient in C/C++ and Linux, with some exposure to kernel-level work
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited or no direct experience with embedded networking, switch firmware, or security features
No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or Japanese work experience
Lacks specific experience with required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X) or networking protocols (REST API, NETCONF, SNMP)
